text: Claude Code hooks (provision.go signalCommand) write state-only signals with no message text. The frontend (AppShell.tsx, SessionTabs.tsx) requires both nudgeEmoji AND nudgeSummary to render row2, so non-working states were invisible. Fix: signalCommandWithContext extracts JSON fields from stdin (jq), frontend falls back to state name.

git clone --bare only creates refs/heads/* not refs/remotes/origin/* — remote tracking refs only appear after git fetch. GetDefaultBranch triggers ensureOriginQueryRepo which fetches from origin, populating remote refs in the bare clone.

Race condition in conflict resolution tab: WS handler unconditionally re-adds conflict state after local dismiss. Between clearLinearSyncResolveConflictState and DELETE processing, BroadcastSessions can re-send stale state. Fix: track dismissed workspace IDs in a ref to prevent re-addition of non-in_progress states.

Bare clone refs/heads/main is never updated after git fetch — only refs/remotes/origin/main gets updated. This causes stale local main when addWorktree uses the local branch. Fix: updateLocalDefaultBranch fast-forwards refs/heads/main to match origin/main after each fetch, guarded by worktree checkout check and fast-forward safety.
